bug_locations.reason: The constructor uses a mutable default list for subprotocols, which can leak state across websocket client instances and affect subprotocol negotiation tests.
The ping timeout logic may close connections prematurely because it compares elapsed pong time against timeout without fully accounting for ping scheduling and delayed callbacks.
Compressed message handling aborts immediately after decompression overflow, which may bypass expected close-handshake behavior and fail size-limit websocket tests.
